action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py works correctly (23/100 objects processed) but was killed after 139s (exit code 120 = timeout). At ~6s/object, 100 objects would take ~600s = 10 minutes. The eval likely has a timeout. Analysis: I need to speed up rendering. Key optimization: batch all 11 views together in a single renderer call instead of 11 separate calls. The renderer can handle batched rays. Also, I should reduce chunk_size or use GPU more efficiently. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to batch all 11 views' rays together [11*H*W, 3] and render in one pass, then reshape. This should give ~11x speedup for the rendering step.
